commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining action is security/codeowner policy approval and live workflow confidence, not an automated code repair.; Needs attention: The patch intentionally broadens a supply-chain guard approval boundary, so security/codeowner review should confirm the repository-admin trust model before merge. commands.review_summary:
The PR lets repository admins, in addition to security approvers/secops, authorize SHA-bound dependency-guard overrides and updates the guard messages plus focused tests.

PR surface: Tests +25, Other +24. Total +49 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source inspection shows current main only accepts configured/security approvers for the override path, so an admin outside that set is not accepted; I did not run a live GitHub Actions admin override because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is security/codeowner policy approval and live workflow confidence, not an automated code repair.
